title: lytoneuron rufum
side_effects: Lytoneuron rufum can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing dizziness, nausea, and headaches due to its high concentration of neurotoxins. Prolonged exposure to its extracts may also lead to memory loss, confusion, and impaired cognitive function. In severe cases, misuse of the plant can result in seizures, coma, and even death. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using Lytoneuron rufum for any health purpose to avoid these potential side effects.
